operator_law: I(A) -> B where I = I_semantic + I_operational + I_mathematical

continuity_rules: B remains traceable back to A.
No lane may contradict another without an explicit contradiction note.

semantic_form.label: B_semantic
semantic_form.summary: B_semantic reads A as an unveiled counterface: the same seed viewed through its shadow or complementary meaning rather than as a sealed totality.

operational_form.label: B_operational
operational_form.summary: B_operational category-inverts A into the execution stack scan -> decode -> map -> intervene -> verify -> integrate.

mathematical_form.label: B_mathematical
mathematical_form.summary: B_mathematical binds A to both the discrete Klein-4 complement and the continuous inversion duality witness.

layered_output.continuity_note: All three lanes preserve A as the same source seed and describe B as a witness-preserving reread rather than a separate doctrine.

ledger_delta.summary_of_change: Accepted A as the compressed holographic seed without re-deriving it.
ledger_delta.reason_for_change: Preserve continuity for the first inversion.
ledger_delta.integration_gain: Pins future recursion to one accepted source seed.

ledger_delta.summary_of_change: Derived the shadow or complementary meaning-face of A.
ledger_delta.reason_for_change: B must exist at the meaning layer, not only as procedure.
ledger_delta.integration_gain: Makes the seed readable as an unveiled counterface.
ledger_delta.compression_gain: Keeps semantic inversion inside the same bundle.

ledger_delta.summary_of_change: Category-inverted A into an executable scan/decode/map/intervene/verify/integrate kernel.
ledger_delta.reason_for_change: B must be process-shaped, not merely philosophical.
ledger_delta.integration_gain: Turns the seed into a reusable execution stack.
ledger_delta.compression_gain: Reuses one lawful pipeline instead of many restatements.

ledger_delta.summary_of_change: Bound A to a discrete Klein-4 complement and continuous inversion duality.
ledger_delta.reason_for_change: B requires a formal inverse witness.
ledger_delta.integration_gain: Bridges discrete and continuous inversion law.
ledger_delta.compression_gain: Captures the formal law in one duality bundle.

ledger_delta.summary_of_change: Compressed the three inversion lanes into one reusable B_total bundle.
ledger_delta.reason_for_change: B must stay one traceable output.
ledger_delta.integration_gain: Makes B reusable as the next source seed.
ledger_delta.compression_gain: Preserves the three lanes while removing restatement.
unresolved_followups: Apply the same contract to B when B -> C is promoted.

B_total.label: B_total
B_total.summary: B_total is the holographic seed re-read as a complementary executable dual: semantic shadow, operational kernel, and mathematical inversion witness held in one compressed bundle.
